completo:
---
config:
  title: Visão Geral de Ofertas
  duration: 
    from: ns
    to: ms
  limits:
    fast: 100
    medium: 400
    slow: 1000
  background: true
---
graph:
  bff["BFF Ofertas"] { lang: Go, squad: Core Squad }
  auth["Auth Service"] { lang: Node.js, aws: Cognito }
  pipeline["Hiring Pipeline"] { lang: Go, squad: Core Squad }
  db["DynamoDB"] { type: Database, aws: DynamoDB }
  external["API Externa ERP"] { type: Legacy, desc: "Processamento pesado em lote" }

  bff --> |80000000| auth
  bff --> |120000000| pipeline
  pipeline --> |350000000| sqs["AWS SQS"] { type: Queue }
  pipeline --> |600000000| db
  pipeline --> |2500000000| external
datadog:
---
config:
  title: Datadog Raw Spans
  duration: 
    from: ns
    to: s
  limits:
    fast: 100
    medium: 500
  background: false
---
graph:
  frontend["Frontend App"] { type: SPA } --> |95000000| bff["BFF Layer"] { lang: Go }
  bff --> |1200000000| legacy["Legacy Monolith"] { lang: Java 8 }
  bff --> |60000000| search["Search Service"] { lang: Python }
  legacy --> |800000000| oracle["Oracle DB"] { type: Database }
  legacy --> |350000000| files["File Storage"]
  search --> |40000000| elastic["Elasticsearch"]
